subdomains.description: This subdomain focuses on the ability to ask and answer questions about a text, recount stories, and describe characters in a story.
This subdomain focuses on the ability to describe characters in a story and explain how their actions contribute to the sequence of events.

standards.description: Ask and answer questions to demonstrate understanding of a text, referring explicitly to the text as the basis for the answers.

performanceLevels.title: Below Basic
performanceLevels.description: The student is able to ask and answer questions about a text with significant prompting and support, demonstrating a limited understanding of the text.

performanceLevels.title: Basic
performanceLevels.description: The student is able to ask and answer questions about a text with some prompting and support, demonstrating a basic understanding of the text.

performanceLevels.title: Proficient
performanceLevels.description: The student is able to ask and answer questions about a text independently, demonstrating a proficient understanding of the text.

performanceLevels.title: Advanced
performanceLevels.description: The student is able to ask and answer questions about a text independently and provide detailed explanations, demonstrating an advanced understanding of the text.

standards.description: Recount stories, including fables, folktales, and myths from diverse cultures; determine the central message, lesson, or moral and explain how it is conveyed through key details in the text.

performanceLevels.title: Below Basic
performanceLevels.description: The student is able to recount a story with significant prompting and support, demonstrating a limited understanding of the central message, lesson, or moral.

performanceLevels.title: Basic
performanceLevels.description: The student is able to recount a story with some prompting and support, demonstrating a basic understanding of the central message, lesson, or moral.

performanceLevels.title: Proficient
performanceLevels.description: The student is able to recount a story independently, demonstrating a proficient understanding of the central message, lesson, or moral.

performanceLevels.title: Advanced
performanceLevels.description: The student is able to recount a story independently and provide detailed explanations, demonstrating an advanced understanding of the central message, lesson, or moral.

standards.description: Describe characters in a story (e.g., their traits, motivations, or feelings) and explain how their actions contribute to the sequence of events.

performanceLevels.title: Below Basic
performanceLevels.description: The student is able to describe characters in a story with significant prompting and support, demonstrating a limited understanding of their traits, motivations, or feelings.

performanceLevels.title: Basic
performanceLevels.description: The student is able to describe characters in a story with some prompting and support, demonstrating a basic understanding of their traits, motivations, or feelings.

performanceLevels.title: Proficient
performanceLevels.description: The student is able to describe characters in a story independently, demonstrating a proficient understanding of their traits, motivations, or feelings.

performanceLevels.title: Advanced
performanceLevels.description: The student is able to describe characters in a story independently and provide detailed explanations, demonstrating an advanced understanding of their traits, motivations, or feelings.
